_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Maintain deployable cyber defense toolkit (e.g. specialized cyber defense software/hardware) to support IRT mission.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain AI security standards for the enterprise, including training data provenance requirements, model registry controls, and LLM application security requirements.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-K-023 (AI, cosine: 0.424), DG-T-007 (DG, cosine: 0.418).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.9/10 (raw 0.390). Shared vocabulary: [maintain]. DCWF-only terms [cyber, defense, deployable, hardware, irt, mission] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, application, controls, data, develop, enterprise] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.856 (P=0.857, R=0.854). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (98.7%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Maintain deployable cyber defense toolkit (e.g. specialized cyber defense softwa" and "Develop and maintain AI security standards for the enterprise, including trainin". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.427 ≈ STS 0.390 (gap 0.037). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [maintain] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.1%. Shared tokens: [maintain]. DCWF-only: [cyber, defense, deployable, hardware, irt, mission]. WIDAI-only: [ai, application, controls, data, develop, enterprise].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 98.7% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
